name: S-18 consumption trace records the operator-bypass flag when --bypassed is passed per §2.17 audit semantics
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/consumption-trace.sh" --commit-sha abc123 --consulted-standards google-tsguide --bypassed --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --emit trace.json && grep -q 'operator-bypass' trace.json && echo bypassed 1>&2
